interview_panel_for_petros_application: Datuk Abang Arabi Abang Narudin (SVP SRM)

payload.document_title: Q1 2024 Upstream Business Performance - Operational & Financial
payload.release_authority_required: Head of Finance & Risk, Petronas Carigali (Karima)

vector.channel: PETRONAS corporate email -> external Petros email
vector.location_at_send: B-6-10, Marc Service Residence, Jalan Pinang, KL

timeline.event: Khairul applies Head Upstream Finance @ Petros
Petros offers Head Finance (Gas Aggregator & SRM) RM25k/mo
Q1 2024 report presented to Upstream Leadership Team
WBC alerts Jumsuri Basri @ Twin Towers
Trial Day 3 - PW3 Nurul Qurratu Aini (Petros HR)
Trial continues before Mazuliana Abdul Rashid

charge.statute: Section 203A(1) Penal Code read with Section 511
charge.framing: Attempting to disclose information obtained in course of official duty
charge.framing_tension: Charge uses 'attempt' (§511) but Cyber confirmed successful 15:19 send

defense: Alibi: was on holiday in Penang 8 Jun 2024; laptop with female colleague
Document discrepancy: suspension letter says 'attempt', police report says 'sent'
WBC incomplete: did not contact Petros email owners, did not weigh show-cause reply
Third-party hypothesis: another person may have sent from Khairul's email

institutional_context.petros_status: State oil co of Sarawak, est. 2017
institutional_context.active_negotiation_track: SRM / Gas Aggregator between PETRONAS and Petros
institutional_context.media_framing: leak could 'jeopardise' / 'undermine' negotiations and national interests

detection_trail.public_framing: 'Cyber Security confirmed' across Malay Mail, Utusan, Borneo Post, Astro Awani

open_threads: Reply emails / WhatsApp / prior contact between Khairul and Janin/Azha outside HR
Forensic findings from Khairul's laptop (3rd-party vendor, identity unrecorded)
AGC rationale for §511 (attempt) framing despite successful send
Any §203A charges against recipients (Janin, Azha) - no public record
